name: Boston Chicken Saucer Sized Chocolate Chip Co
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolates together, stirring until smooth.
2. Pour into a greased 9-inch metal pie pan and refrigerate until hard.
3. Pound the mixture into pea-sized bits using a rolling pin.
4. Store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
- Use about 1/3 cup of cookie dough. Flatten it to form rounds that are 3-1/2 to 4 inches in size.
- Bake at 375°F for 16 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown but not overbaked. The cookies will look almost raw at the end of 16 minutes and will continue to bake as they cool on sheets a few minutes.
Source: Gloria Pitzer.
